title: Fitness Exceptions
description: Schema for fitness-exceptions.toml - ratchet-style exceptions to fitness rules per APS-V1-0002 §5. Top-level keys are rule IDs; nested keys are entity paths.

additionalProperties.description: Map from entity path (e.g., 'src/module.py::function') to exception entry. The key MUST identify an entity the target rule evaluates.

value.description: Current metric value at time of exception. Acts as the ratchet budget: when the actual value exceeds this, the exception is insufficient and the violation is reported as unexcepted. Ratcheting MUST be monotonically tightening.

targets.description: For dependency rules: specific import targets excepted.

issue.description: GitHub issue reference (e.g., '#138', 'org/repo#42'). REQUIRED - exceptions without issue references MUST cause a validation error (MISSING_ISSUE_REF).
